race.comment: Plenty of these won't be maidens long. WINDARA ROCK IT (8) was well in the market on debut and after getting back to midfield found the line strongly to finish a head second behind Savage River. Doesn't have to improve much. GEEGEES AVALANCHE (3) was another from that race and was well supported for first outing and finished a close-up fourth. Expected to feature. UPHEAVAL (7) was in the same race and finished sixth. Fitter and expected to improve sharply. MIDWAY POINT (5) is another from the Savage River race and finished seventh but beaten just over a length. Rates highly and is right in the mix again. UNFILTERED (6) can run well fresh on best figures.
